THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIHIRETU, MISGANAW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY PLUDER, MARIUSZ $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $425.00, THE JUDGMENT RESULTED FROM A MOTOR VEHICLE ACCIDENT ON A CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY CAUSED BY THE DEFENDANTS OPERATION OF A MOTOR VEHICLE RESULTING IN PROPERTY DAMAGE IN EXCESS OF $750.00 AND BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS)

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NATIONAL CAB COMPANY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
